# Bali By Made — Private Driver & Local Guide in Ubud, Bali

## Who is Made?

Made is a local guide born and raised in Ubud, Bali, with over 10 years of experience driving
visitors across the island. He offers private car tours, airport transfers, and fully custom
routes — not a generic taxi service, but a local guide who knows the hidden spots, the quiet
times to visit popular places, and the real stories behind them.

## Services offered

### 1. Private day tours (10 fixed routes)
All routes start in Ubud and include a private air-conditioned car, an English-speaking guide,
bottled water, and hotel pick-up/drop-off in the Ubud area. Prices range from $65 (half-day) to
$160 (the 2–4 day Grand Bali Loop). Routes cover: Kintamani volcano, Sidemen valley and Amed coast,
Munduk highlands, Sekumpul waterfalls, Jatiluwih UNESCO rice terraces, Eastern temples (Besakih,
Lempuyang, Tirta Gangga), Uluwatu cliffs, and a full island loop.

### 2. Airport transfers
Fixed-price private transfers from Ngurah Rai International Airport to Kuta/Seminyak/Legian ($25),
Nusa Dua/Jimbaran ($25), Canggu ($25), Sanur/Denpasar ($20), Ubud ($30), and Lovina/North Bali
($60). Includes private car, petrol, parking, mineral water and highway tolls.

### 3. Custom routes (Route Builder)
Visitors can pick their own stops from over 140 destinations across Bali (temples, waterfalls,
rice terraces, beaches, viewpoints, markets) using an interactive route builder that estimates
distance, driving time and price, then books directly via WhatsApp.

## How booking works

There is no booking platform or payment processor — every booking happens through a direct
WhatsApp conversation with Made. He typically responds within an hour.

## Pricing summary

| Service | Price |
|---|---|
| Half-day private route | From $65 |
| Full-day private route | From $70–$120 |
| Grand Bali Loop (2–4 days) | From $160 |
| Airport transfer | $20–$60 depending on destination |

Prices are per car (not per person) and include fuel, parking and tolls.

## Languages supported

The website is available in 22 languages: English, Hindi, Chinese, German, French, Malay, Dutch,
Russian, Ukrainian, Japanese, Korean, Italian, Portuguese, Spanish, Indonesian, Arabic, Swedish,
Norwegian, Polish, Turkish, Finnish, Danish.

## Contact

- Website: https://balibymade.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/balibymade
- WhatsApp: direct booking link on every page

## Canonical URL

https://balibymade.com
